$comment: Autonomous Agent OS pattern-catalog registry (Block E). Maps a vuln class to its descriptor file under common/patterns/. ARCHON's richer markdown catalogs remain the source of truth for access-control (40) and xss (50); the 4 previously-null code-review classes (sqli/ssrf/rce/account-takeover) ship as full inline catalogs. The other ~14 spec categories are added incrementally behind the same flag.
